description:
"Heh, my history? Well, they used to call me 'The Spear Of Justice' haha! Get a load of that! Nah... I ain't no hero anymore. Maybe I would still be, but I'm relyin' on Frisk now. Oh? What about Frisk? Are they huntin' yeh? . . . WELL WHY ARE YA WAITIN' HERE! Ha-ha-- COUGH COUGH- Run along punk!"
